allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); models=d.get\('models',[]\); print\(f'Total models: {len\(models\)}'\); [print\(f\\"\\\\nModel {i+1}:\\\\n  ID: {m.get\('id'\)}\\\\n  Type: {m.get\('model_type'\)}\\\\n  Dataset: {m.get\('dataset_id'\)}\\\\n  Status: {m.get\('status'\)}\\\\n  Config: {m.get\('config'\)[:200] if m.get\('config'\) else 'None'}...\\"\) for i,m in enumerate\(models[:3]\)]")
